ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(ISCHANGED(SAP_Order__c),ISBLANK(SAP_Order__c), $Profile.Name <> 'OneSource Americas Sales', $Profile.Name <> 'OneSource APAC Sales', $Profile.Name <> 'OneSource EMEA Sales', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Owner.Business__c,'Food Business')), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "Closed Won"),OR($Profile.Name = 'LST Americas Sales', $Profile.Name = 'LST EMEA Sales', $Profile.Name = 'EH Americas Sales', $Profile.Name = 'EH EMEA Sales', $Profile.Name = 'DAS APAC Sales', $Profile.Name = 'SVMX PS - Customer Care', NOT(CONTAINS($Label.Trigger_validation_rule_for_users, $User.Id))))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_032: SAP Order# cannot be modified once an opportunity is 'Closed Won'
